level.setting: The Abyssal Shrine, a sunken temple at the bottom of the Midnight Trench

pickup.name: Magnetic Ore Shard
pickup.effect: Increases magnetic pull on nearby metal objects

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct triggers a massive landslide, revealing a hidden cavern.

pickup.name: Abyssal Pearl
pickup.effect: Allows the user to see through magical illusions

encounters.trigger: Clearing the eel allows the bioluminescent light to shine on a concealed switch.

pickup.name: Keystone Seal
pickup.effect: Stabilizes energy fields

encounters.trigger: Destroying the guardian dispels the barrier blocking the entrance to the inner sanctum.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Deep
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Keystone Seal into the core to banish the Leviathan

level.objective: Retrieve the Sunken Keystone from the Abyssal Shrine to restore light to the ocean floor.
level.reward: The Heart of the Ocean Amulet

level.setting: An ancient, submerged civilization now blanketed by glowing bio-luminescence

pickup.name: Glowing Pearl
pickup.effect: Emits a calming aura that pacifies aggressive wildlife

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Urchin clears the path to the Crystal Grotto

pickup.name: Ancient Conch
pickup.effect: Summons a tidal wave to break hardened barriers

encounters.trigger: Driving away the Eel unlocks the seal to the Temple Spire

pickup.name: Essence of Clarity
pickup.effect: Reveals the true form of the temple guardian

encounters.trigger: Purifying the Seastar grants access to the Throne Room

boss.name: Guardian of the Deep
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence of Clarity to reveal the guardian's core and strike it

level.objective: Cleanse the Sunken Ruins of coral blight to restore the serene flow of the current.

level.setting: An ancient, decaying underwater temple at the bottom of the Mariana Trench

pickup.name: Corroded Iron Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Gate to the Sunken Archives

encounters.trigger: Defeating the eel draws the blood mist to the archive seal

pickup.name: Crystalline Heart
pickup.effect: Used to bind soul energy for the ritual

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Archivist releases the anchor chain to the Throne Room

pickup.name: Abyssal Sigil
pickup.effect: Mandatory to weaken the Sunken King's shield

encounters.trigger: The death of the Guardian summons the Sunken King

boss.name: Sunken King
boss.victory_condition: Seal the King's soul back into the sarcophagus

level.objective: Resurrect the Sunken King from the Abyssal Tomb to claim the Eternal Tide Amulet.

level.setting: An uncharted trench 30,000 leagues below the surface

pickup.name: Magnesium Flare
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds enemies and heats surrounding water

encounters.trigger: Defeating the swarm reveals a sonar ping leading to the ruins.

pickup.name: Acoustic Resonator
pickup.effect: Emits a frequency that shatters crystalline structures

encounters.trigger: The sentinels fall triggers a seismic shift opening the deep vault.

pickup.name: Ancient Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Highly reactive unstable energy source

encounters.trigger: Clearing the squid unlocks the main hatch for the boss arena.

level.objective: Escape the Abyssal Trench before your pressure suit integrity fails completely.
level.reward: The Trident of the Storm God

level.setting: The desolate trenches of Planet Thalassa

pickup.name: Thermal Core
pickup.effect: Emits a high-heat signature pulse

encounters.trigger: Opening the Lurker's carcass reveals the entrance to the Sunken Ruins.

pickup.name: Electrified Harpoon
pickup.effect: Inflicts massive damage to conductive targets

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian collapses the floor, leading to the Deep Abyss chamber.

pickup.name: Stasis Field Emitter
pickup.effect: Freezes organic entities in place

encounters.trigger: The Eel's death signals the arrival of the Trench Mother.

boss.name: Trench Mother
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Mother's neural link and escape through the hatch.

level.objective: Escape the Abyssal Trench after recovering the stolen relic.

encounters.hazard: Pressurized steam jets that push the player backwards.

pickup.name: Magnesium Fuel Cell
pickup.effect: Increases flame radius and intensifies burning.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Prowler clears the path to the Boiling Trench.

encounters.hazard: Collapsing coral pillars that deal heavy crush damage.

pickup.name: Oxygen Catalytic Core
pickup.effect: Allows fire to burn underwater at maximum intensity.

encounters.trigger: Crushing the crab reveals a passage to the Ruined Temple.

pickup.name: Abyssal Key Fragment
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Altar for the final confrontation.

encounters.trigger: Banishing the witch unlocks the altar for the boss fight.

boss.name: The Leviathan of Drowned Souls
boss.victory_condition: Ignite all four corner vents simultaneously while the boss is exposed.

level.objective: Ignite the thermal vents to purge the abyssal rift of corruption.

pickup.name: Thermal Flare
pickup.effect: Temporarily illuminates dark zones and startles light-sensitive predators

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Crawler breaches the bulkhead, leading to the thermal vents.

pickup.name: Rusty Pressure Valve
pickup.effect: Necessary to jam the boss's internal cooling intake

encounters.trigger: Clearing the sentinel unlocks the floodgate to the central ruins.

enemy.name: Void Hydra
enemy.weakness: Sonic Anchor strikes to exposed glowing core

pickup.name: Oxygen Canister
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health

encounters.trigger: Surviving the Hydra exposes the entrance to the Deep Throne.

boss.name: Leviathan Guardian
boss.weakness: Jamming the internal cooling intake with the Rusty Pressure Valve
boss.victory_condition: Disable all pressure vents to collapse the chamber

level.objective: Escape the submerged ruins before your life support fails.

pickup.name: Bubble Tonic
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab releases a tide that flows toward the Kelp Forest.

pickup.name: Glowing Lantern-Fish
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden passages and boss secrets

encounters.trigger: The jelly drops a key that opens the path to the Sunken Throne.

pickup.name: Prism-Shard
pickup.effect: Solidifies illusions

encounters.trigger: The eel drops a crown fragment that acts as a key for the boss door.

boss.name: The Monochrome King
boss.victory_condition: Solidify the King's shadow using the Prism-Shard

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Glitter-Pearl to restore color to the Coral Kingdom.

pickup.name: Fermented Berry
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed temporarily

encounters.trigger: Defeating the ape drops a key that unlocks the Heavy Vines leading to the Sunken Swamp.

pickup.name: Sonic Whistle
pickup.effect: Stuns organic creatures

encounters.trigger: Killing the serpent clears the path to the temple inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Disables magical defensive barriers

encounters.trigger: Subduing the guardian triggers the portal activation for the boss chamber.

boss.name: Primordial Gorilla
boss.victory_condition: Deplete all health while shield is lowered

level.objective: Retrieve the Ancient Totem from the heart of the Overgrown Ruins to restore balance to the wild.

pickup.name: Fire Resin
pickup.effect: Coats arrows to deal bonus fire damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals a hidden path through the fog to the Sacred Pool.

pickup.name: Ancient Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals thermal weak points on heavy armor

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel crashes into the water, bridge-forming across the chasm to the Altar.

pickup.name: Sunstone Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main sanctum gate

encounters.trigger: The jaguar retreats, opening a passage to the inner sanctum where the boss awaits.

boss.name: The Verdant Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Defeat the guardian to stabilize the jungle's energy.

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Sunstone from the heart of the Whispering Canopy.

encounters.hazard: Thick fog limiting visibility to five feet

pickup.name: Antidote Flask
pickup.effect: Immunity to poison for 60 seconds

encounters.trigger: Opening the stalker's chest reveals a map pointing to the River Crossing.

encounters.hazard: Slippery mud reducing movement speed by half

pickup.name: Sun-Reflector Shield
pickup.effect: Blinds enemies for 5 seconds upon active parry

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Goliath causes the river level to drop, exposing the path to the Altar.

encounters.hazard: Spiked floor plates dealing 5 damage every step

pickup.name: Ancient Keystone
pickup.effect: Used to deactivate boss arena forcefields

encounters.trigger: The Monk dies, dropping the Ancient Keystone, which unlocks the central temple gate.

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Jade Idol from the temple ruins.
level.reward: The Jade Idol and the title of Jungle Warden

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Dew
pickup.effect: Increases damage to wooden structures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler reveals the path to the Glowing Grove.

pickup.name: Lunar Lotus Petal
pickup.effect: Allows damage to spectral armor

encounters.trigger: Clearing the beetles opens the gate to the Crystal Waterfall.

pickup.name: Primal Root Essence
pickup.effect: Required to purify the Boss

encounters.trigger: Activating the statue platform unlocks the path to the Ancient Heart Tree.

boss.name: Shadow Canopy Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Purify the serpent to save the tree

level.objective: Restore the ancient spirit tree by collecting essence from corrupted monoliths.

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Amber
pickup.effect: Increases damage against spectral entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beast causes the ancient stone gate to the ravine to creak open.

pickup.name: Cursed Effigy
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with spirit altars

encounters.trigger: The shaman falls, dropping a key that unlocks the Ziggurat bridge.

pickup.name: Obsidian Seal
pickup.effect: Weakens the boss's necrotic barrier

encounters.trigger: The seal glows, revealing the path to the inner sanctum where the boss awaits.

boss.name: Malakor the Soul-Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Channel the necromantic aura to drain the boss of its essence while protected by the seal.

level.objective: Ritually cleanse the corrupted heart of the jungle by binding the ancient specter residing within the forbidden ziggurat.

level.setting: The Whispering Canopy, a vibrant, bioluminescent rainforest filled with enchanted flora.

pickup.name: Firefly Jar
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark paths and burns plant matter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the slime causes the vines to wither and reveals the entrance to the Shadowy Grove.

pickup.name: Ancient Pollen Dust
pickup.effect: Creates a hypnotic mist that calms aggressive spirits

encounters.trigger: Clearing the bats dissipates the fog and triggers the gate to the Gilded Ruins.

pickup.name: Crystallized Sap
pickup.effect: Strengthens and hardens organic materials

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the guardian opens the main vault, leading to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: The Great Serpent of Echoes
boss.victory_condition: Calm the serpent to reclaim the Golden Frog idol

level.objective: Retrieve the Golden Frog idol from the heart of the Whispering Canopy.
level.reward: The Golden Frog Idol and mastery of the Alchemist's Transmutation Brew

pickup.name: Sun-Dried Lens
pickup.effect: Focuses light to burn organic matter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel clears the path to the inner temple.

pickup.name: Frozen Time Catalyst
pickup.effect: Temporarily stasis-locks targets

encounters.trigger: The panther's collapse triggers the activation of the ancient elevators.

pickup.name: Paradox Key
pickup.effect: Bypasses temporal shielding

encounters.trigger: The Echo dissipates, revealing the seal to the boss chamber.

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Core from the heart of the overgrown ruins.

level.setting: The decaying remnants of an ancient, trapped rainforest civilization.

pickup.name: Heavy Steel Gauntlet
pickup.effect: Increases melee impact damage by double against stone-like targets

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Stalker triggers the collapse of the nearby bridge, forcing entry into the Deep Thicket.

pickup.name: Sun-Bleached Idol
pickup.effect: Emits a searing light that burns ancient, dark-magic infused entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem reveals a hidden altar that signals the guardian of the Heart of the Jungle.

pickup.name: Ancient Heartstone
pickup.effect: Vibrates with immense pressure when brought near the final corruption core

encounters.trigger: Purifying the Spirit dissolves the final wall, granting access to the Boss Lair.

boss.name: The Corrupted Avatar
boss.victory_condition: Crush the avatar's core using the weight of the acquired artifacts.

level.objective: Traverse the Silent Canopy to silence the Source of Corruption.
